title: Sub-resource vs. Root-resource Architecture
description: Evaluate the trade-offs between deep nesting and flat resource structures in API design. Architect resource structures that optimize for cacheability and clear URL design. Distinguish between sub-resource and root-resource architectural approaches.
objectives: Evaluate the trade-offs between deep nesting and flat resource structures in API design.
Architect resource structures that optimize for cacheability and clear URL design.
Distinguish between sub-resource and root-resource architectural approaches.
